_doc: Declared registry of human-owned authoring fields — the source of truth for the Authoring Completeness invariant. A field here is information the platform CANNOT derive (owner:human, derivable:false); the checker enumerates this registry at t0 and refuses to run the pipeline until every required field is supplied. Adding a human-owned field tomorrow is a declaration here, not a code change. Boundary 2 (Authority vs Authorship): the compiler derives what is derivable, the human provides what is not, the worker transforms between them.

subdomain_purpose.why: the scope of authority everything downstream hangs from; no compiled artifact can derive why the subdomain exists
subdomain_purpose.prompt: One short paragraph for a business stakeholder: what this subdomain governs, what authority it establishes, what lifecycle it manages, and why it exists. No artifact names.
